## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Sunbit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, social media, and reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [25 new articles completed with social media posts, meta details, and key takeaways](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Focus remains on B2C Dental and B2C Auto content to compete with Care Credit](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Need to refine summary/key points format for LLM optimization while maintaining reader engagement](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [Social media strategy requires adjustment (platform-specific content, focus on Instagram/Facebook)](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Reporting to be prioritized in upcoming meetings for data-driven insights](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [25 new articles completed, including social media posts and meta details](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Plan to get ahead by creating 50-100 topic ideas for the coming month](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Continuing focus on B2C Dental and B2C Auto content to compete with Care Credit's keyword density](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)

### Blog Structure and LLM Optimization

  - [Current blog structure includes image, brief summary, and key takeaways optimized for LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Discussion on balancing LLM-friendly content with human reader engagement](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Consideration of A/B testing for placement of summaries and key takeaways](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Need to finalize style before automation to ensure consistency](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)

### Social Media Strategy

  - [Current approach of duplicating content across platforms needs refinement](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
  - [Suggestion to create unique posts for different channels (Instagram, Facebook)](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Discontinue content creation for LinkedIn and X (Twitter) for now](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
  - [Need to develop a strategy for repeating content across multiple days](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Captions require improvement; some are too lengthy](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)

### Website Issues and Conversion

  - [Duplicate "Knowledge Center" in URL structure identified; to be addressed with website agency](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [New form on blog pages for lead generation, primarily for B2B paid traffic](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [Discussion on form design and placement for optimal user experience and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)

### Reporting and Analytics

  - [Identified need to focus more on reporting in future meetings](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Plan to dig deeper into data-driven insights for content performance](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)

### Team Changes

  - [Darrell Etherington departing GrowthX; Kyle Gaudreau stepping into his role](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [Kyle's background in digital growth and experience with Trey highlighted as valuable](https://fathom.video/share/RVaEoqXE_ehS_bbcYsFyF_qQ8QJFX9AY?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
